violations.text: The floors (under 3 bay sink, soda storage) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
A drain line is draining into a handsink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
